---
title: "Read"
subtitle: "Notes that move between experiment, structure and proof."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: articles
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
  feed: true
---

::: {.content-block .mn-page-lead}
These essays are written for mathematically curious readers. Computation and pictures may suggest the route, but definitions and arguments are expected to carry their own weight.
:::
